description.ko: 첨단 생물 발광 추적 기술과 고압 선체 무결성을 갖춘 AQUA-5 잠수정으로 바다의 신비로운 깊은 곳을 탐험하세요.
description.en: Explore the mysterious depths of the ocean with the AQUA-5 submersible, featuring advanced bioluminescent tracking and high-pressure hull integrity.

prompt: Cinematic underwater shot of the AQUA-5 high-tech research submarine navigating a dark abyssal trench, bioluminescent sea life glowing in the background, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic, volumetric lighting, deep blue and teal color palette.
